name: James, Bishop of Catania
troparia: (Tone 8) O guide of the true faith, mirror of piety and commendable behaviour,* bright star of the universe, and adornment of pontiffs,* you enlightened us all by our teachings.* O wise James, inspired by God and lyre of the Holy Spirit,* intercede with Christ our God that He may save our souls.
kontakia: (Tone 4) By mortifying your body, O blessed James,* you abandoned the world and followed Christ.* You were given the anointing of the priesthood* and have been admitted to angelic choirs.* Now pray for all of us who bless you.
